description: User drags the minimum price slider to increase the lower bound of the price filter from AU$0 to AU$770.
frame_description: The user is interacting with the price range filter on the left sidebar of the Expedia search results page.

description: The page displays a loading spinner and then updates the hotel list based on the new minimum price filter.
frame_description: A loading overlay appears over the search results while the page refreshes.

description: User drags the maximum price slider to decrease the upper bound of the price filter to AU$2,610.
frame_description: The user adjusts the upper limit of the price filter.

description: The page displays a loading spinner and updates the hotel list based on the new maximum price filter.
frame_description: The search results refresh again to apply the updated maximum price.

description: User adjusts the maximum price slider again to further refine the search results to a lower maximum.
frame_description: A quick adjustment to the maximum price slider.

description: The search results refresh and update to reflect the final price filter settings, showing hotels within the AU$1,019 to AU$1,645 range.
frame_description: The final set of filtered results is loaded onto the page.
